_comment: Standing white-banner geometry (post + crossbar + cloth) reproducing MC's banner-ITEM render (white_banner = minecraft:special/minecraft:banner; ItemDisplay context NONE → no item-model display transform, so this is the raw standing-banner special render). Canonical BannerModel dims (flag 20x40x1, post 2x42x2, crossbar 20x2x2) baked with the standing-render 2/3 scale; x/z centred on the anchor (model 8,8,8 = the windmill blades' pivot); post spans the full height with its base at the block bottom; cloth is the front layer (−z side of the post, so the post sits behind it) and stops ~1/13 above the bottom so a sliver of post is exposed. Block-model space (16 = 1 block). Rendered by docs/util/blockmodel.js. CANDIDATE: scale / y-anchor verified against the docs windmill viewer.
